title: polygala septentrionalis
intro: Polygala septentrionalis, also known as Northern Milkwort, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Polygalaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and fever, due to its antiviral and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is rich in flavonoids, which have been found to have antioxidant and immune-boosting effects, contributing to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving overall well-being. Northern Milkwort can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, with some sources also using the plant's roots and rhizomes in traditional medicine.
